title: Check for Odd Number Using Logical NOT

content.problemStatement:
Write a C program to determine if a number is odd using the Logical NOT (`!`) operator to negate the even condition. Also, use the Logical OR (`||`) operator to check if the number is positive. The program prints whether the number did not pass the even check or is positive.

---
**Expected Output**
```default
Did the number NOT pass the even check or is positive? 1
```
